scenarios.label: Visual flash
scenarios.summary: Brief high-salience visual onset drives rapid feedforward relay activation.
scenarios.evidence: Conceptual synthesis of canonical excitatory-inhibitory-modulatory circuit motifs.
scenarios.mechanism: Radial web deterministic propagation with ring and cross-link routing under milestone-stepped timeline control.
citation_tags: London and Hausser 2005 Annu Rev Neurosci

milestones.title: Baseline
milestones.narration: The network starts near resting baseline with low background activity.

milestones.title: Input onset
milestones.narration: Visual flash onset: upstream sensory channels start deterministic drive into relay neurons.

milestones.title: Relay convergence
milestones.narration: Activity converges onto hubs N11 and N12 while inhibitory gate A starts shaping spread.

milestones.title: Mid-network split
milestones.narration: Propagation splits into upper and lower hub lanes with selective gain from modulatory nodes.

milestones.title: Decision layer
milestones.narration: Decision neurons accumulate weighted input and begin committing toward output channels.

milestones.title: Output transfer
milestones.narration: Late-stage pulses reach motor outputs N23 and N24 with branch-specific intensity.

milestones.title: Stabilization
milestones.narration: Visual flash stabilization: inhibitory and modulatory lanes settle the network toward reset.

scenarios.mechanism: Radial web deterministic propagation with ring and cross-link routing under milestone-stepped timeline control.
citation_tags: London and Hausser 2005 Annu Rev Neurosci
